column10: Q:CL4. From April the National Insurance rate will increase by 1.25 percentage points, with the average cost per worker being approximately £250 per year. The money is being used to fund more money for the NHS and social care. Have you or have you not made any preparations (e.g. planned for the increase, cut back on spending etc) specifically for this rise in April?
column15: I did not know this was happening
